name: sentinelx-fullstack
description: SentinelX Cybersecurity Platform - Full Stack Development

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.clean: cd sentinelx && rm -rf node_modules && cd ../backend && rm -rf venv

author: SentinelX Team
